Why TrueGate

Built for clear strategy and stronger documentation outcomes.

We combine practical profile planning, structured checks, and transparent support so each application is prepared with consistency.

Our process is designed to reduce avoidable file errors and improve clarity before final submission.

Transparent Process

Clear communication from intake to final file submission.

Ethical Documentation

Accurate paperwork with practical advice and no false claims.

Experienced Consultants

Team guidance built from years of Kerala visa documentation work.

High Consistency

A repeatable process that improves application quality and clarity.

Client Stories

What Our Clients Say

Real stories from applicants who secured their visa approvals through TrueGate Visa.

"I had an excellent experience with TrueGate Visa. Their team helped with my Canada student visa filing. The SOP audit and financial documentation structuring was highly professional. Got my approval stamped in 3 weeks!"

AK
Ajmal Karuthedath

Canada Student Visa

"Excellent service for Schengen tourist visa. The Ernakulam team provided a detailed day-wise itinerary, verified all flight/hotel vouchers, and drafted the cover letter. The submission was completely stress-free."

SN
Sana Nasri

Germany Tourist Visa (Schengen)

"Very professional approach. They analyzed my profile and guided me through the complex UK Certificate of Sponsorship (CoS) filing. The mock embassy interview sessions boosted my confidence significantly!"

RJ
Rahul James

UK Skilled Worker Visa

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Get direct answers to common queries regarding document audit workflows, consular processing, and support.

We offer comprehensive profile assessments, personalized documentation checklists, cover letter drafting, application form filing, fee transaction routing, and customized embassy mock interview coaching.

No ethical agency can guarantee visa approval. The final decision rests entirely with the respective consular officer or embassy. TrueGate Visa ensures your application is completely error-free and aligned with consular rules to maximize your approval probability.

Our documentation audit and compilation generally take 3 to 7 working days once you submit the raw records. Concurring embassy processing times depend on appointment queues and consular timelines of the destination country.

Yes, we specialize in refusal audits. We read CAIPS/GCMS logs, identify structural document errors, resolve coverage issues, and write detailed corrective appeal submissions for a successful re-application.

Core requirements include a valid Letter of Acceptance (LOA or CAS) from a Designated Learning Institution, proof of language proficiency (IELTS, PTE, or TOEFL), academic transcripts, and verified financial capacity. For Canada, this includes a GIC (Guaranteed Investment Certificate); for Germany/Schengen, a Blocked Account is standard.

Proving funding is the most common reason for visa rejection. We guide you on structuring bank statements, preparing sponsor affidavits, evaluating liquid assets, organizing tax returns (ITRs), and documenting education loans to satisfy strict immigration audits.

Yes, dependent visa pathways are available for many destinations. For example, Canada, Australia, and the UK offer specific spouse open work permits or dependent visitor options, allowing your family to accompany you. We offer combined family file compilation services.

Consular appointment slots can be scarce. We actively monitor slots on booking portals, assist you in securing early queue schedules, and prepare you with embassy-specific mock interview sessions to boost your confidence.

Absolutely. While our head office is in Ernakulam, Kerala, we provide end-to-end digital consultancy services. Through secure cloud document sharing and virtual consultation meetings, we assist clients across India and internationally.

TrueGate Visa is Ernakulam’s trusted process-driven immigration consultancy, specializing in high-success visa solutions for students, skilled professionals, families, and tourists worldwide. With a strong focus on accuracy, compliance, and transparency, we provide end-to-end guidance through detailed documentation audits, personalized visa strategies, interview preparation, and expert advisory support to ensure a smooth and reliable immigration journey.

Verified Consular Documentation Support
